languages.text: "Эоганн, будь честен со мной. Нунцуис — изуверский интеллект?"
"Eogunn, be honest with me. Is Nuncius an Abominable Intelligence?"
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, будь честен со мной. Нунцуис — изуверский интеллект?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, be honest with me. Is Nuncius an Abominable Intelligence?"
"Eogunn, be honest with me. Is Nuncius an Abominable Intelligence?"
"Eogunn, be honest with me. Is Nuncius an Abominable Intelligence?"

languages.text: «Eogunn, sea sincero conmigo. ¿Es Nuncius una Inteligencia Abominable?».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, be honest with me. Is Nuncius an Abominable Intelligence?"

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, sea sincero conmigo. ¿Es Nuncius una Inteligencia Abominable?».

languages.text: “伊奥贡，你跟我老实说。努恩修斯是不是憎恶智能？”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, be honest with me. Is Nuncius an Abominable Intelligence?"

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，你跟我老实说。努恩修斯是不是憎恶智能？”

languages.text: « Eogunn, répondez-moi franchement : Nuncius est-il une Intelligence Abominable ? »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, be honest with me. Is Nuncius an Abominable Intelligence?"

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, répondez-moi franchement : Nuncius est-il une Intelligence Abominable ? »

languages.text: "Eogunn, seid ehrlich zu mir. Ist Nuncius eine Abscheuliche Intelligenz?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, be honest with me. Is Nuncius an Abominable Intelligence?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, seid ehrlich zu mir. Ist Nuncius eine Abscheuliche Intelligenz?"

languages.text: "エオグン、正直に言ってくれ。ヌンシウスは忌まわしき知性か？"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, be honest with me. Is Nuncius an Abominable Intelligence?"

languages.text: "Eogunn, bana karşı dürüst ol. Nuncius bir Yezit Zekâ mı?"
